_approval_note: yolo: required for non-interactive delegation (Claude→Gemini via cross-agent-delegate). auto/auto_edit only covers file edits — Bash commands (Python, shell scripts) still prompt and block background sessions. The supervisor review at Claude Code is the real gate; see cross-agent-delegate SKILL.md §7. sandbox:false required — Seatbelt blocks uvx package cache (~/.cache/uv/) and mcp-remote OAuth store (~/.mcp-auth/) needed by MCP servers.
